title: Up We Go!
description: Launch mobs into the skies with your choice of fireworks.
body:
![Banner](https://i.imgur.com/bDNZjuN.png)

A small mod that brings a bit of joy in life by launching entities with fireworks.

Preview: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=3mdWdeVbLi4&ab_channel=corgiintights

Fireworks now lift up mobs for as long as they keep moving up, fireworks with firework stars attached can also damage mobs midair
- Does not lift players

- Adds more utility and advantages to making fireworks

- Easier method to control upwards entity movement
------
